blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,919 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
